P324.basis: Phase-221: INITIAL-dominant (I=0.78, freq=99 in CISI). Pre-context: nakaram (place), kāṇṭāmirukam (rhinoceros), kaḷiṟu (elephant). Post-context: P332 (ko-vowel candidate), P086=oru. LOW: 260 anchors — positional heuristic only, NOT verified phonetic readings. UNCERTAIN: 1 (M267 — high-frequency functional sign, identity unknown). For publication: report only HIGH + MEDIUM anchors as scientifically supportable.
